Map.detailDataBody: Displayed boundaries come from display-safe OSM-Boundaries-derived layers; the offshore-islands layer stays separate to avoid overlap.
Map.dataNoticeBody: Province boundaries are based on OSM-Boundaries. The Hoang Sa and Truong Sa layer uses geoBoundaries ADM2 as reference data; data is still being verified and may contain inaccuracies.
